articles.title: OPEN SOURCE
articles.summary: Everyone's building an agent framework. OpenProse [4] has one: it's called English.

articles.title: 3 AI PM ARCHETYPES + 1
articles.summary: AI will not replace product managers wholesale. The best PMs will use it to improve decisions, alignment, and product impact.

articles.title: THE 4 LEVELS TO BECOME A BUILDER PM (WITHOUT KNOWING HOW TO CODE) (70 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: Non-technical PMs need to become builders, not backlog managers. AI tools now let PMs prototype, ship low-risk work, and orchestrate agents while preserving judgment, taste, and product quality.

articles.title: THE DO'S AND DON'TS OF MINIMUM VIABLE PRODUCT MARKETING
articles.summary: PostHog keeps product marketing fast, practical, and story-driven. Great launches need clarity, strong writing, smart channels, internal alignment, and real customer stories.

articles.title: WHEN GROWTH SLOWS, IS IT SALES' FAULT OR THE PRODUCT'S FAULT? THE ANSWER HAS CHANGED
articles.summary: Slowing growth is not always a sales problem. In the AI era, product velocity and competitiveness may be the real growth levers.

articles.title: IS A COIN FLIP PROTECTING YOUR PLATFORM'S INTEGRITY?
articles.summary: Veriff's 2026 Deepfakes Report [9] reveals that the average person's ability to detect a deepfake is just 7% ABOVE THE THRESHOLD OF RANDOM GUESSING. Don't leave your platform's trust and safety to chance. Download the full research report here [9] to stay ahead of identity fraud.

articles.title: USER INTERVIEWS: THE COMPLETE GUIDE FOR 2026
articles.summary: User interviews help teams understand what users need, why they behave the way they do, and where products can improve. This guide shows how to run them well, from recruiting participants to analyzing insights.

articles.title: EX-STRIPE CTO IS RUNNING A FREE PM WORKSHOP: BUILD AN AI AGENT SYSTEM FOR YOUR TEAM
articles.summary: PMs should use AI agents to automate routine workflows, not replace judgment. The best PMs will become agent orchestrators who protect their taste, focus, and strategic thinking.

articles.title: NOTION'S NEW WORKERS CAN BUILD STRIPE DASHBOARDS AND IS A CLAUDE BACKLASH BREWING?
articles.summary: AI is moving deeper into product workflows through Notion Workers, agentic Android features, and vibe-coded tools. At the same time, companies are cutting weak AI features and rethinking how to use AI without adding bloat.

articles.title: YOUR AI FRUSTRATION IS MY OPPORTUNITY
articles.summary: AI frustration is a signal, not a reason to settle. The last 10% of craft is where better tools, stronger judgment, and real differentiation emerge.

articles.summary: Skip abstract strategy debates that only sound smart.
